paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF)** to fine-tune GPT-3 models, combining **supervised fine-tuning (SFT)** with **PPO** to align model outputs with human preferences on instruction-following tasks.
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following, chat, open-ended generation, question answering, summarization, and closed-domain reasoning tasks.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models with human intent to improve helpfulness, honesty, and harmlessness while reducing harmful/toxic outputs.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) via Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) + Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT)
raw_extraction.extension: Combines **PPO updates with pretraining-distribution likelihood maximization (PPO-ptx)** to mitigate performance regressions on public NLP datasets without compromising labeler preferences.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF)** to fine-tune GPT-3 models, combining **supervised fine-tuning (SFT)** with **PPO** to align model outputs with human preferences on instruction-following tasks.
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following, chat, open-ended generation, question answering, summarization, and closed-domain reasoning tasks.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models with human intent to improve helpfulness, honesty, and harmlessness while reducing harmful/toxic outputs.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) via Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) + Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT)
raw_extraction.extension: Combines **PPO updates with pretraining-distribution likelihood maximization (PPO-ptx)** to mitigate performance regressions on public NLP datasets without compromising labeler preferences.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF)** to fine-tune GPT-3 models, combining **supervised fine-tuning (SFT)** with **PPO** to align model outputs with human preferences on instruction-following tasks.
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following, chat, open-ended generation, question answering, summarization, and closed-domain reasoning tasks.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models with human intent to improve helpfulness, honesty, and harmlessness while reducing harmful/toxic outputs.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) via Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) + Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT)
raw_extraction.extension: Combines **PPO updates with pretraining-distribution likelihood maximization (PPO-ptx)** to mitigate performance regressions on public NLP datasets without compromising labeler preferences.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Instruction Fine-Tuning** combining supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with human feedback via reward modeling (RM) and reinforcement learning (PPO), enabling models to align with user intent across diverse tasks like generation, QA, and dialog.
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following chatbots, customer assistant interactions, natural language understanding/generation, zero-shot task adaptation, and mitigating harmful/toxic content.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models with human preferences and instructions for safer, more controllable, and helpful responses.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) using labeled demonstrations, Reward Modeling (RM) with human preference rankings, Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) for reinforcement learning with human feedback (RLHF)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Instruction Fine-Tuning** combining supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with human feedback via reward modeling (RM) and reinforcement learning (PPO), enabling models to align with user intent across diverse tasks like generation, QA, and dialog.
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following chatbots, customer assistant interactions, natural language understanding/generation, zero-shot task adaptation, and mitigating harmful/toxic content.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models with human preferences and instructions for safer, more controllable, and helpful responses.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) using labeled demonstrations, Reward Modeling (RM) with human preference rankings, Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) for reinforcement learning with human feedback (RLHF)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Instruction Fine-Tuning** combining supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with human feedback via reward modeling (RM) and reinforcement learning (PPO), enabling models to align with user intent across diverse tasks like generation, QA, and dialog. Also explores **PPO-ptx**, which mixes pretraining gradients during PPO to improve generalization on public NLP datasets.
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following chatbots, customer assistant interactions, natural language understanding/generation, zero-shot task adaptation, and mitigating harmful/toxic content.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models with human preferences and instructions for safer, more controllable, and helpful responses.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) using labeled demonstrations, Reward Modeling (RM) with human preference rankings, Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) for reinforcement learning with human feedback (RLHF)
raw_extraction.extension: **PPO-ptx** integrates pretraining gradients into PPO updates to mitigate performance regression on traditional NLP benchmarks.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to align large language models with human instructions using demonstration data.
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following, chat, question answering, creative writing, dialogue
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models to follow user instructions effectively through supervised fine-tuning
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Uses reinforcement learning with human feedback (RLHF) to further refine instruction-following capabilities after supervised fine-tuning, improving truthfulness, informativeness, and reducing toxicity.
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following, chat, question answering, creative writing, dialogue, safer and more helpful interactions
raw_extraction.research_problem: Refining instruction-following models using human preference optimization to improve alignment with human values and reduce harmful behaviors
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) using Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Combines RLHF with additional pretraining updates ('ptx') to mitigate performance degradation on public NLP datasets while maintaining improved instruction-following capabilities.
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following, chat, question answering, creative writing, dialogue, safer and more helpful interactions with reduced performance loss on standard benchmarks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Balancing instruction-following improvements with minimal performance regression on traditional NLP benchmarks
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) using PPO with additional pretraining updates mixed into the fine-tuning process
raw_extraction.extension: Mixing pretraining updates into the RLHF fine-tuning process to reduce performance regressions on public NLP datasets.
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF)**, where models are fine-tuned to align with human preferences via pairwise comparisons of generated responses, enabling instruction-following capabilities.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Unspecified large-scale text corpus (presumably including WebText, Common Crawl, and other proprietary datasets)
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following, conversational agents, chatbots, and general-purpose language understanding with controlled output.
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models with human intent and ethical constraints through supervised and reinforcement learning from human feedback.
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) using preference comparison data collected from human labelers
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Instruction Tuning** via supervised fine-tuning on diverse instruction-following datasets, combining labeler-generated prompts and API user submissions to align models with human intent.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: BooksCorpus, WebText, API user prompts (OpenAI Playground)
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following, conversational AI, chatbot applications, zero-shot task generalization
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models to follow complex human instructions through scalable instruction tuning
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on instruction-following data generated via bootstrapping (labeler-written prompts + API user prompts)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: **Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF)** combines supervised fine-tuning with iterative ranking via human preference judgments to optimize alignment with human values and intent.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: BooksCorpus, WebText, API user prompts (OpenAI Playground)
raw_extraction.application: Conversational agents, chatbots, decision-support systems requiring nuanced human-like responses
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable alignment of language models to human preferences via RLHF
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) + Reinforcement Learning (RM) with human feedback (ranking outputs)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback) combined with supervised fine-tuning and mitigates performance regressions on public NLP datasets by mixing pretraining gradients during PPO training
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following, conversational AI, natural language understanding, and generation tasks requiring alignment with human intent
raw_extraction.research_problem: Aligning large language models with human preferences and improving instruction-following capabilities while avoiding performance degradation on downstream tasks
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) + supervised fine-tuning (SFT) + pretraining gradient mixing during PPO training
raw_extraction.extension: Mixing pretraining gradients during PPO training to mitigate performance regressions on public NLP datasets
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Scalable RLHF framework applied to a 6B parameter model, demonstrating improved instruction-following and human preference alignment while maintaining robustness across various tasks
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-following, chatbots, conversational agents, and applications requiring nuanced human-like responses
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling RLHF techniques to larger models and ensuring generalization across different tasks and contexts
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) + supervised fine-tuning (SFT) + pretraining gradient mixing during PPO training
raw_extraction.extension: Mixing pretraining gradients during PPO training to mitigate performance regressions on public NLP datasets
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Application of RLHF to the largest model size (175B) in the series, addressing challenges of scaling reinforcement learning methods to massive models
raw_extraction.application: Advanced conversational AI, specialized instruction-following systems, and high-stakes decision-making support systems
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling RLHF to extremely large models while preserving performance on complex tasks and mitigating regressions
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) + supervised fine-tuning (SFT) + pretraining gradient mixing during PPO training
raw_extraction.extension: Mixing pretraining gradients during PPO training to mitigate performance regressions on public NLP datasets
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback

raw_extraction.innovation: Fine-tuning a 175B T5 model on the FLAN dataset to improve instruction-following capabilities, leveraging the encoder-decoder architecture for sequence-to-sequence tasks
raw_extraction.application: Instruction-based text generation, question answering, summarization, and multi-task learning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Adapting large encoder-decoder models for instruction-based tasks through targeted fine-tuning
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Masked Language Modeling (MLM) + Denoising Sequence-to-Sequence Pre-training
raw_extraction.paper_title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback
